overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city at night during heavy rain. The camera moves from an elevated highway overlook through covered plazas with holographic fish advertisements, ascending neon-lit stairs, and following holographic koi along curved elevated walkways. High-quality game engine footage featuring ray-traced reflections and atmospheric neon lighting.

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated walkway overlooking the highway traffic below, then turning left

vehicle light trails moving on the multi-lane highway below
glowing blue safety railing along the walkway edge
concrete pedestrian path with wet reflective surface from rain

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated concrete walkway at night during heavy rain, overlooking a busy highway with streaking vehicle lights below. The Kang Tao tower dominates the skyline ahead, while blue neon railings line the path. The camera turns left at the end of the walkway toward a covered plaza area.

large orange holographic koi fish swims overhead through the plaza

segments.scene_description: Moving through a partially covered urban plaza sheltered from the rain by concrete overpasses. A bright red vending booth stands on the left where a person sits on a nearby bench. Digital billboards line the walkway while a massive orange holographic koi fish swims overhead, casting glowing reflections on the wet pavement.

agents.ego_description: walking through covered walkway and ascending stairs with blue neon lighting

segments.scene_description: Proceeding through a covered walkway lined with palm trees and digital billboards, approaching a wide staircase illuminated with blue neon strips. Other pedestrians are visible walking in the opposite direction. The camera begins ascending the stairs toward an upper level, leaving the orange holographic fish behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated curved walkway with holographic art installation

blue holographic koi fish appears and swims overhead guiding the path

agents.ego_description: following the blue holographic fish along the curved elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto an open elevated plaza exposed to the rainy night sky, following a massive blue holographic koi fish that swims overhead. The walkway curves gently with glowing floor panels and blue neon edge lighting. A futuristic circular building stands to the left as the camera continues along the path, guided by the ethereal blue hologram.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rainy cyberpunk cityscape, transitioning from a high-altitude highway overlook into a series of neon-lit plazas and elevated walkways. It begins on a concrete path overlooking a busy highway with streaking lights and the towering Kang Tao building ahead, before turning left into a sheltered urban plaza. As the camera moves under concrete overpasses, the environment shifts from open rain to a covered space featuring a red vending booth and a massive orange holographic koi fish that casts a glow over the wet pavement. The scene then proceeds through a palm-lined walkway and ascends a wide staircase illuminated by blue neon strips, leaving the orange hologram behind as the camera climbs toward an upper level. Finally, the path emerges back into the rainy night sky, curving along glowing floor panels and past a circular building while following a massive blue holographic koi fish.
